title: codereview-pass1: spec table update for /deaddrop /confessions lacks full protocol details, OSCORE specifics, DTN mechanics, test vector refs
description: Review finding: table is insufficient; needs dedicated subsections like other apps (SOS, groups). Missing SenML structure example, rate limit params, no-log policy, e-ink integration points. Add before 18.10. Discovered-from spec edit.
close_reason: Fixed via spec edit adding full sections 18.9-18.12 with OSCORE/DTN/SenML/rate-limit/e-ink details, table cleanup, 3 codereview passes converged with P3 opinion only
